title: Remove the learnings pair from the review wave; orchestrator synthesizes inline; standard = 4 core reviewers
action: Per the approved plan (docs/history/learnings-pair-relocation/plan.md, Approach): (1) bee-reviewing/SKILL.md — lane table standard row becomes '4 core reviewers (S1 table)'; delete the learnings-researcher and learnings-synthesizer rows from the S1 roster; state in S1/S2 that precedent arrives pre-loaded in plan.md (planning bootstrap owns the search) and that the orchestrator performs synthesis itself after ALL reviewers return; replace the red flag 'learnings-synthesizer run before the other reviewers finish' with 'synthesis started before every reviewer returned'. (2) reviewing-reference.md — isolation paragraph drops 'Reviewers 1-5 ... synthesizer runs after'; delete the two pair rows from the focus-line table; tiers line drops researcher/synthesizer; red-flags line 'synthesizer run before specialists finish' reworded to the orchestrator-synthesis form. (3) bee-hive/SKILL.md lane-scaling table: '4 core reviewers + learnings pair' -> '4 core reviewers'. (4) README.md line ~187: drop the 'plus a learnings-researcher ... and a learnings-synthesizer ...' clause so the roster names only the 4 always-on reviewers. Keep severity/corroboration/autofix_class semantics untouched — only WHO performs synthesis changes.

truths: grep -F for learnings-researcher, 'learnings pair', and bare 'synthesizer' over the 4 files returns zero lines
Both roster tables (bee-reviewing lane table, bee-hive lane-scaling table) read '4 core reviewers' for standard
bee-reviewing states the orchestrator performs synthesis after all reviewers return, and that precedent reaches reviewers via plan.md from planning's bootstrap search
Severity rules, corroboration promotion, autofix_class, and the conditional-reviewer table are semantically unchanged
prohibitions: No edits to archaeology: docs/01-distillation.md, docs/04-skills-spec.md, docs/decisions/*, skills/bee-reviewing/CREATION-LOG.md, docs/history/** (except this feature's own dir)
No edits to skills/bee-planning or skills/bee-compounding — both already own their duty (plan S 'Scoping refinement')
No test, CI, lockfile, or verify-config changes

verify: ! grep -rn -F -e learnings-researcher -e 'learnings pair' -e synthesizer skills/bee-reviewing/SKILL.md skills/bee-reviewing/references/reviewing-reference.md skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md README.md && grep -qF '4 core reviewers' skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md && grep -qF '4 core reviewers' skills/bee-reviewing/SKILL.md && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: Learnings pair removed from the review wave: bee-reviewing standard lane = 4 core reviewers; precedent flows planning->plan.md->reviewers (planning bootstrap already owned the search); synthesis performed inline by the review orchestrator after all reviewers return (same model as the old ceiling-tier subagent, one dispatch fewer); bee-hive lane table and README roster updated to match. -2 subagent dispatches per standard/high-risk feature, knowledge machinery untouched.
